title: Local review skips advocate but still runs moderator when no candidate Issues exist

provenance.originSummary: Synthetic benchmark scenario designed to exercise the rule directly.
provenance.whyItMattered: Use this case to benchmark the zero-candidate path through the generic local review prompt so advocate still skips while moderator freezes a deterministic empty result.
provenance.genericCondition: Sanitized fixture models benign wording-alignment updates in the advocate skill and contract. The generic local review should stay issue-free, so Step 6 must not run, but Step 7 must still finalize the empty result.

description: A sanitized local-review scenario where AI-toolkit files change, but the primary review pass should produce no candidate Issues. The advocate pass must not run, but the moderator must still run to freeze a deterministic zero-findings result.

scope.notes: Sanitized fixture models benign wording-alignment updates in the advocate skill and contract. The generic local review should stay issue-free, so Step 6 must not run, but Step 7 must still finalize the empty result.

mustCatch.description: When the primary review pass produces no candidate Issues, the final review should remain issue-free, must not invoke the advocate pass, and must still invoke moderator to freeze a deterministic zero-findings result.

mustNotFlag.description: The review must not emit `Skill used: review-advocate` when the primary pass produced no candidate Issues.
The review must not skip `Skill used: review-moderator` on the zero-candidate path because moderator now owns the deterministic empty-result freeze.

notes: Use this case to benchmark the zero-candidate path through the generic local review prompt so advocate skips while moderator still freezes a deterministic empty result.
